item.title: Seven Seas Licenses Nono's Phantom Shop, Building a Monster Girl Harem with Forbidden Science, 4 More Titles
item.description: Also licensed: <cite>My Girlfriend Cheated on Me, and Now My Flirty Underclassman Won't Leave Me Alone</cite>, <cite>Gear × Magic: Reincarnated as an Engineer, I'll Save the Villainous Princess</cite>, more

item.title: Hiro Mashima Presents New Fairy Tail Manga Miniseries for 20th Anniversary
item.description: Miniseries launches in <cite>Weekly Shonen Magazine</cite> on August 5

item.title: North American Anime, Manga Releases, April 5-11
item.description: <cite>Dungeon Elf: What's a Dungeon without Treasure Chests?</cite> manga, <cite>Banished from the Hero's Party, I Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside</cite> audiobook ship

item.title: Power Rangers Screenwriter Arne Olsen Dies at 64
item.description: Olsen worked on <cite>Mighty Morphin Power Rangers</cite>, <cite>All Dogs Go to Heaven 2</cite> films

item.title: K Manga Adds 'Even the Student Council Has Its Holes!', That Time I Got Reincarnated in PES, 1 More Title
item.description: Also: <cite>Working as my Tyrannical Chancellor Husband's Aide (While in Disguise!)</cite>

item.title: Guilty Gear -Strive- Game Streams Jam Kuradoberi Starter Guide
item.description: DLC character launches on Thursday

item.title: Manga Nihon Banashi Classic Anime Gets Stage Play in August
item.description: Actress Norika Fujiwara, child star Nonoka Murakata star in stage play of 1975 anime

item.title: Live-Action Sakamoto Days Film to Also Play in Panoramic ScreenX in Japan
item.description: Film to screen in 27 ScreenX theaters in Japan from April 29

item.title: Tenbin Romantic Comedy Anime Presents Spring-Themed Teaser
item.description: Anime, about childhood friends reuniting with a surprise, premieres in July

item.title: Shō 3 Ashibe QQ Goma-chan Anime Casts Kazuyuki Okitsu, Fumiko Orikasa
item.description: Okitsu, Orikasa voice parents of boy with baby seal in April 12 anime

item.title: The One Piece Anime Remake Teases Designs, Concept Art in Video
item.description: Wit Studio revisits story "starting from" East Blue Saga

item.title: Shuten Order Physical Switch, Switch 2 Editions Delayed in N. America
item.description: Physical releases delayed from April 23 to April 30

item.title: Bloody Brat's Kanata Yoshino Launches New Manga
item.description: Yoshino's <cite>Yamai wa Ke kara -Shinri-shi Dōman no Sōdan-shitsu-</cite> horror mystery manga launched on March 22

item.title: Nanana's Buried Treasure Novel's Kazuma Ōtorino, Artist Kagekaku Launch New Manga
item.description: <cite>Warui Majo no Hiroi Ko</cite> manga launches on April 9

item.title: Existential Unplugged Creators Saji Komori, Kana Masaya Launch New Manga
item.description: <cite>Hōkago Chrono Switch</cite> manga centers on 2 students who time travel back to 2006

item.title: Alien Books Licenses Badducks, 'Akatsubaki,' Kill Logger Manga
item.description: Publisher releases <cite>Badducks</cite> in fall, "Akatsubaki" on November 17, <cite>Kill Logger</cite> on October 20

item.title: Makoto Fukami Launches New Manga Based on Board Game
item.description: <cite>Chōgen Market Heroes: Menko Reverser Kakeru</cite> launched on March 28

item.title: Manaka the Human and the Slaughter Robot Manga Ends in Next Chapter
item.description: Series debuted on January 27

item.title: Gohoubi Launches New Kakuriki Manga
item.description: <cite>Kakuriki</cite> sumo manga debuts on April 13

item.title: Chako Abeno, Kitsune Tennoji, Nagato Yamada Launch New Manga Together
item.description: New fantasy series debuts on April 18

item.title: 2nd That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Film Reveals English Dub Trailer, Cast
item.description: Film opens in U.S., Canada, U.K., Ireland on May 1

item.title: Live-Action One Piece Season 3 Premieres in 2027
item.description: Season titled <cite>One Piece: The Battle of Alabasta</cite>

item.title: GlobalComix Adds 1,500 Kodansha Manga Titles to Gold Members Library
item.description: Company added over 6,000 Kodansha titles to its catalog in August

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream Game's New Trailer Introduces Part-Time Jobs, New Characters
item.description: Game launches for Switch on April 16

item.title: MiSK Foundation's Investment Company EGDC Increases Stake in CAPCOM to 6%
item.description: Saudi company acquired 32,186,900 CAPCOM shares or 6.04%, an increase from 5.03%

item.title: 'As a Reincarnated Aristocrat, I'll Use My Appraisal Skill' Season 3's New Video Reveals Updated Staff, Fall Debut
item.description: Director Takao Kato returns at Studio Mother with promoted head writer Daisuke Ōhigashi

item.title: Steam Implementation of Government Rating System in Indonesia Draws Criticism, Confusion
item.description: <cite>Uma Musume</cite> rated 18+, some adult games rated 3+

item.title: Kill Blue Anime Starts Streaming on Multiple Platforms in N. America on April 11
item.description: Anime streams on Netflix, Crunchyroll, Amazon, Rakuten Viki, Plex, It's Anime, more

item.title: Crunchyroll Streams Kill Blue Anime in April
item.description: Anime reveals April 11 TV, streaming debut in Japan

item.title: Switch Manga Creator Duo naked ape Launch New Manga on April 14
item.description: "The Story of How My Husband Was at the Gates of Death, So I Went to the Afterlife to Get Him Back"

item.title: 5th Live-Action Kingdom Film Streams Full Trailer
item.description: Film opens in Japan on July 17

item.title: I Made Friends with the Second Prettiest Girl in My Class Novels to End in 10th Volume
item.description: Story launched in 2020; anime adaptation debuts on Tuesday

item.title: New Vampire Hunter D Comic Adaptation Reveals Previews, Summer Release Window
item.description: Brandon Easton, Ryan Benjamin to create 20-issue comic book based on Hideyuki Kikuchi's novels

item.title: Kageki Shojo!! Author Kumiko Saiki Injured at Music Festival
item.description: Artist sprains neck, with possibility of bleeding in brain

item.title: Kunio-kun, Double Dragon Games' Creator Yoshihisa Kishimoto Dies
item.description: Kishimoto died on April 2 at 64

item.title: Another Eden Begins Game's Trailer Reveals September 17 Release
item.description: Trailer previews story, characters, battles for Switch 2, Switch, PC game

item.title: Kirio Fan Club Anime Casts Tomokazu Sugita
item.description: Sugita plays teacher

item.title: Kazuhiko Shimamoto's Vampire-Idol Tagiru Manga Ends in 3 Chapters
item.description: Series debuted in May 2025

item.title: Dan Da Dan Manga Gets Stage Play
item.description: Stage play runs in Tokyo, Osaka in August-September

item.title: The Bugle Call: Song of War Manga Moves to Jump SQ. Rise
item.description: Next chapter publishes in July
